description: Prisma SQLite foundation: add Patient model + region to Site, db client singleton (src/lib/db.ts), prisma generate + db push, empty seed (0 rows), smoke script proving counts=0

Connect sponsor feasibility to Python estimator FastAPI /feasibility/estimate; documented data fallback (omop_sample/synthetic)
Restyle /sponsor and /site to light claude.css tokens (terracota/paper); remove hardcoded navy backgrounds
Confirm parse.ts reads ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from process.env; add .env.local plumbing (placeholder) + verify .gitignore covers .env.local + .env.example
Green gates + end-to-end smoke: npm run build exit 0, typecheck 0, test all pass; curl estimator returns JSON; final proof pasted
